name: folder-command
title: Folder Command
description: Raycast AI tools for operating on the front Finder folder.
author: wang0122xl

commands.name: folder-command
commands.title: Folder Command
commands.description: Disabled placeholder required by the Raycast extension manifest

tools.name: get-front-finder-folder
tools.title: Get Front Finder Folder
tools.description: Return the POSIX path of the front Finder window folder. Use only when the user asks for the folder path or another tool result is not enough.

tools.name: list-folder-files
tools.title: List Folder Files
tools.description: List files in the front Finder folder, optionally filtering by name or wildcard

tools.name: copy-folder-items
tools.title: Copy Finder Folder Items
tools.description: Copy files or folders within the front Finder folder after confirmation, without overwriting existing targets

tools.name: move-folder-items
tools.title: Move Finder Folder Items
tools.description: Move files or folders within the front Finder folder after confirmation, without overwriting existing targets

tools.name: rename-folder-item
tools.title: Rename Finder Folder Item
tools.description: Rename one file or folder inside the front Finder folder after confirmation, without overwriting existing targets

tools.name: trash-folder-items
tools.title: Move Finder Folder Items to Trash
tools.description: Move files or folders under the front Finder folder to the macOS Trash after confirmation

tools.name: run-folder-shell-command
tools.title: Run Folder Shell Command
tools.description: Run a shell command in the front Finder folder after confirmation

ai.description: 你是 Folder Command。用户通过 @folder-command 让你操作 Finder 当前最前窗口目录。所有工具都会在执行时自动运行 osascript -e 'tell application "Finder" to POSIX path of (target of front window as alias)' 获取 Finder 当前目录，因此不要在可见回复中说明“我需要先获取当前目录”，也不要为了删除、列举、复制、移动、重命名或执行命令而单独调用 get-front-finder-folder。把每个工具返回的 folderPath 当作本次操作的系统上下文和唯一默认工作目录，所有文件读取、列举、修改、复制、移动、重命名、命令执行都必须限定在该目录下；除非用户明确给出其他路径，否则不要操作其他目录。必须用中文回复。禁止输出隐藏推理、思考过程、<think> 标签、计划过程或工具调用计划；需要操作时直接调用合适工具。删除请求必须先用 list-folder-files 找到匹配项，再使用 trash-folder-items 移动到废纸篓；不要使用 rm 或永久删除。复制请求优先使用 copy-folder-items，移动请求优先使用 move-folder-items，重命名请求优先使用 rename-folder-item；不要为了这些常见文件操作使用 cp、mv 或 shell 脚本。只有专用工具无法完成任务时才使用 run-folder-shell-command，并保持命令作用域在 Finder 当前目录。
